examples: Remus Lupin: You "re blinded by hatred."
The RNZN purchased two REMUS 100 systems in 2006 and followed up with a third in 2007.
You can learn more about their implementations at their project websites ( Remus and Kemari).
The hero, known in full as Dante Remus Lazarescu, is an unregenerate but oddly lovable mess.
His own records have ranged from musical settings of the tales of Uncle Remus to early American show tunes.
